_comment: Direct CWE -> ATT&CK (enterprise) bridge. The CWE->CAPEC->ATT&CK chain is authoritative but sparse — many CWEs have no CAPEC that carries an ATT&CK taxonomy mapping. This curated class-level bridge covers the CWE Top 25 and other common weakness classes, mapping each to the ATT&CK technique(s) an adversary uses to exploit that weakness class. It is the dense complement to capec_attack.json. Confidence is set a notch below the full CAPEC chain because these are weakness-class generalizations, not per-pattern taxonomy links. Every CVE carries a CWE (from NVD), so this is the high-coverage deterministic path.
